block_00: Market Sentiment — Mass Psychology for Successful Traders
block_01: Trading is not only about the decisions you make, but also about the actions of other market participants. That’s right — the degree of your success can be influenced by the behavior of the trading flock. In other words, market sentiment can impact your performance.
block_02: No matter your preference of trading instrument, it’s a good idea to keep track of how the general market feels. Fortunately, there is a helpful tool that can help you monitor market sentiment and measure whether the prevailing attitude is bullish or bearish.
block_04: How to Day Trade with the Least Square Moving Average
block_05: Trend reversal points play an important role in trading. Identifying them enables traders to open deals at just the right moment. See how to do that with this indicator.
block_07: Woodies CCI — An Entire Trading System in One Indicator
block_08: When we say Woodies CCI is a trading system of its own, we mean it’s composed of many indicators and metrics. It may be complex, but it can provide a strong trading edge once mastered.
